subcodes.first_line: In truth, thou hast been caught up in utmost hardship and tribulation in the path of God, and hast suffered grievous injuries. Thy wealth and possessions were given over to plunder and pillage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقيقه در راه حقّ بنهايت مشقّت و بلايا گرفتار شدی و صدمه زياد خوردی مال و منال بتاراج  و تالان دادی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @martyrs and martyrdom
